name: wpbt
title: Disable Windows Platform Binary Table
description: Prevents your computer vendor from executing programs at boot, reducing potential security risks.
modal: Disabling WPBT prevents vendors from running programs on boot. Confirm you want to apply this tweak?
warning: Some vendor software may not run at startup.
deepDescription: Windows Platform Binary Table (WPBT) allows manufacturers to execute software each boot, including drivers or anti-theft software. Disabling WPBT improves security by blocking this mechanism.
